cross_pollinator_cycle25_signals.insight: Etsy digital product success formula: ultra-specific title + 7-12 images showing product IN USE + instant download framing + 1 social proof review. Specificity beats generic. '$0 vs $500/mo' gap is discoverability + title specificity.
cross_pollinator_cycle25_signals.action_for_products: Audit all 22 PDFs: are titles ultra-specific (niche + format + use case)? Do listings show 7-12 screenshots? Do listings include 'download immediately'? PDFs 19-22 (Reddit Money Machine, Claude Code Mastery, Cold Email System, Prompt Vault) have NO listing markdown — create these first.

pdf_listing_gap.action: Agent or human creates 4 listing files in PRODUCTS/GUMROAD_INSTANT_UPLOAD/ following Etsy formula: ultra-specific title + benefit bullets + instant download framing
